calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-23-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Norsemen Capital

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: David Stone as follows:
Principal $6,922.55
Interest $2,995.20
Attorney's Fees $ 237.25
for a total of $10,155.00
Judgment signed in open court.
